executive_summary: Business survived the full 2016-2025 window including the 2021-22 crisis. Net margin £1,535,308 (8.1% of revenue -- above 2-5% benchmark). Hedging cost £4,232,037 vs going naked (85% mandate price). 511 bill shock events (128 in crisis years); 14/14 retention offers accepted.
